markets.rules_primary: If the play by play or color commentator(s) says Triangle as part of Borralho vs Ridder professional MMA fight originally scheduled for Mar 7, 2026, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
Video of the Borralho vs Ridder professional MMA fight originally scheduled for Mar 7, 2026 will be primarily used to resolve the market; if a consensus by Kalshi employees cannot be reached using video, transcripts of the Borralho vs Ridder professional MMA fight originally scheduled for Mar 7, 2026 will be used according to the news publications listed in the contract.

Payout Criterion: 
- The exact phrase/word, or a plural or possessive form of the phrase/word, must be used. Grammatical/tense inflections are otherwise NOT included. Please see full rules for more details. 
- Commentary will count once the 1st round has begun and end once the referee has decided the fight; for example, commentary after the referee raises the winner's hand will NOT count. 
- Promotional content aired during the event will count, but advertisements with the announcers will NOT. 
- Previously aired content, archival footage, or recordings captured at times, places, or events wholly separate from the featured address will NOT count. 
- If a no contest is called in the fight or the ref calls the fight early commentary will continue to count until the winner is officially declared by the ring announcer.
